title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Committed the reviewed Track 1 checkpoint in three scoped commits: 4ff85b8 hardens Layer 5B generation cleanup, 2e1fa22 freezes approved runtime/readiness contracts and product direction, and aed472e implements reproducible approval receipts. Final review verdict was commit-ready; verification remains 37 focused tests, 268 full tests, clean diff check, and a passing exact-commit build rehearsal.
blockers: No corpus adoption or mutation is authorized; a deterministic fingerprinted adoption plan requires later owner approval.
open_questions: Decide whether the bounded pre-existing Layer 5B cleanup/corruption-recovery carryover should close before Just Works Continuity implementation begins.
Later decide whether fresh ingest may report Ready with history warnings while historical continuity remains incomplete.
next_actions: Begin Track 1 Task 3: implement runtime, install-mode, package-integrity, editable Git-state, receipt, pin, and workflow inspection from the frozen contract.
continuation_hint: Next: Begin Track 1 Task 3: implement runtime, install-mode, package-integrity, editable Git-state, receipt, pin, and workflow inspection from the frozen contract.
